ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population being studied (e.g., clinical, undergraduate, community) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the study */,
  "study_start_date" TEXT /* Date the study began */,
  "study_end_date" TEXT /* Date the study concluded */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison group */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the group belongs to */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the comparison group (e.g., men, women) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the comparison group */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of group (e.g., demographic, clinical, control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_groups_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical measurement */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison group the measurement belongs to */,
  "chi_squared" REAL /* Chi-squared value */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value */,
  "covariance" TEXT /* Covariance matrix */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Method used to obtain the measurement */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_measurements_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES comparison_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the result belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., univariate, multivariate) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "interpretation" TEXT /* Interpretation of the result */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the platform was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, analysis) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structural_invariance" (
  "invariance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structural invariance result */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the result belongs to */,
  "comparison_groups" TEXT /* Comparison groups used in the test */,
  "invariance_level" TEXT /* Level of invariance (e.g., invariant, partially variant, variant) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the invariance test was conducted */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the invariance test */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the invariance result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invariance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structural_invariance_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an analyst */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of relevant certifications */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
